data.title: [ccc3-954a] RED: Write strict verification test — zero .md refs, no bypass
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh — absolute zero plugins/dso refs in .md files under plugins/dso/. NO bypass.

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
MATCHES=$(grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ plugins/dso/docs/ --include="*.md")
if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: Found plugins/dso references in markdown:"
  echo "$MATCHES" | head -30
  exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: Zero plugins/dso refs in markdown"
```

chmod +x. Update .test-index.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
- [ ] Test has NO grep -v bypass
  Verify: ! grep -q "grep -v" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
- [ ] Test FAILS before migration
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
